summary: Tested the critical Personal SMS logging bug fix. Backend 11/11 tests PASS. Frontend verification PASS. The fix correctly uses fetch with keepalive:true for Personal SMS so the API call completes even when browser navigates to native SMS app. Email channel uses regular await flow. Action tiles use setMessage() for pre-fill, not handleSend().

POST_messages_send_personal_sms.details: With channel=sms_personal, message is created in messages collection with status=sent, channel=sms_personal

POST_messages_send_email.details: With channel=email, message is created AND email sent via Resend (returns resend_id when contact has email)

contact_events_personal_sms.details: contact_events created with event_type: personal_sms, digital_card_sent, review_request_sent, congrats_card_sent based on content

contact_events_email.details: contact_events created with event_type: email_sent for email channel

GET_thread_messages.details: Returns messages in chronological order with channel field

frontend_handleSend_personal_sms.details: Lines 681-687 in thread/[id].tsx use fetch() with keepalive:true for Personal SMS. Does NOT use await messagesAPI.send()

frontend_handleSend_email.details: Lines 764 uses await messagesAPI.send() for email (regular flow, no keepalive needed)

frontend_action_tiles_setMessage.details: sendBusinessCardLink() line 896, sendVCardLink() line 913, insertReviewLink() line 855, congrats card line 1078 all use setMessage() not handleSend()

frontend_personal_sms_early_return.details: Line 717 returns early after opening sms: link - does not continue to await flow

frontend_sms_mode_indicator.details: SMS Mode banner visible, 'Tap send to open your SMS app with message ready to go' hint visible

critical_code_review_comments: Code fix confirmed: handleSend() in thread/[id].tsx uses fetch with keepalive:true for Personal SMS (lines 681-687)
The keepalive option ensures the HTTP request completes even when Safari navigates away to native SMS app
Regular email flow correctly uses await messagesAPI.send() (line 764)
Action tiles (Business Card, vCard, Review Link, Congrats Card) use setMessage() for pre-fill - correct behavior
seed_data_creation: Test messages created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal SMS bug fix verified. The key change is using fetch with keepalive:true instead of await for Personal SMS since the browser navigates away when opening sms: protocol. Backend correctly logs messages and creates contact_events. Email channel works with Resend. Twilio SMS is MOCKED - personal SMS fallback is the primary working flow for users without mvpline_number.

mocked_apis.twilio_sms: MOCKED - uses personal SMS fallback for users without mvpline_number
